merged_events.event_description: Diplomatic relations established when Ambassador Mercer Cook presented credentials to Gambian authorities. Cook was nonresident, accredited to Senegal and resident at Dakar.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on August 9, 1965, when Ambassador Mercer Cook presented his credentials to Gambian authorities. Cook also was accredited to Senegal and was resident at Dakar.

merged_events.event_description: The U.S. Embassy at Bathurst (now Banjul) was established, with John G. Gossett as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: The Embassy at Bathurst (now Banjul) was established on September 9, 1965, with John G. Gossett as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

matched.notes: Exact match on date (1965-08-09) and status (Ambassador Nonresident). RDCR confirms diplomatic relations established when Ambassador Mercer Cook presented credentials.
Exact match on date (1965-09-09) and status (Embassy). RDCR confirms Embassy established at Bathurst (now Banjul).
